top_signals.title: Hong Kong to Launch China Bond Futures to Promote Yuan
top_signals.summary: Hong Kong is set to launch China government bond futures amid Beijing’s efforts to promote global yuan usage and attract foreign capital.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: GitHub dismissed security reports on flaws now exploited by supply-chain worm, researchers say
top_signals.summary: GitHub rejected two formal vulnerability reports identifying design flaws that researchers say are enabling variants of the Shai-Hulud supply-chain worm to infect and compromise hundreds of software packages and developer accounts worldwide.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.summary: Temporary duty suspensions and autonomous tariff quotas (ATQs) for importing goods into the UK.

top_signals.title: Clean Energy Investment Hits $2.2 Trillion, Nearly Double Fossil Fuels
top_signals.summary: Despite historic political headwinds against the global decarbonization effort, clean energy spending continues to see a meteoric rise around the world. The International Energy Agency’s World Energy Investment 2026, published in May of this year, projects that of the $3.4 trillion dollars that the world will spend on energy investments this year, $2.2 trillion will go to clean energy, and just $1.2 trillion will go to fossil fuels. This marks a historic shift in energy spending and in energy security priorities on a global level. Worldwide,…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Ark Invest buys $18 million worth of Coinbase shares, offloads $29 million in Robinhood
top_signals.summary: The trades came as Coinbase's stock closed down 2.57% at $164.92 on Wednesday, while Robinhood gained 8.78%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Strategy’s STRC preferred stock closes day 11% under par at $89
top_signals.summary: Wednesday's close of $89 appears to be the lowest on record since the stock was first issued in 2025.

top_signals.title: Google to use UK and EU user IP addresses for ad personalization
top_signals.summary: From August 3, 2026, Google will use IP addresses from UK, EEA and Switzerland users for ad measurement and personalization. It lands as the ICO weighs new consent rules, and years after Google itself called using such signals to identify devices "wrong." [...]
